bindings.quest_action: investigate the pulsing lights and the patterns they've left behind
bindings.quest_focus: the ruins where strange lights appear every night
bindings.quest_stakes: understanding a phenomenon that has the whole settlement on edge
bindings.quest_threat: an unknown force that even the local creatures are afraid of
bindings.quest_origin: lights that started appearing a week ago

dialogueChunks.intro: Ah, {player_name}! I was hoping someone with a curious mind would pass through. Tell me: do you enjoy a good mystery?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} over {quest_focus} {location_hint}: not fire, not torches, something that pulses with a rhythm like a heartbeat. {target_npc} went to investigate and found {quest_item} scattered in deliberate patterns on the ground. The {enemy_type} in the area have been avoiding the ruins entirely. {quest_threat} has everyone baffled.
dialogueChunks.outro: Lights, patterns, and creatures that are afraid to go near. I need someone to {quest_action}.

playerResponses.text: Pulsing lights and deliberate patterns? Now you have my full attention.
Mysteries don't pay the bills. What's the reward for answers?
Unexplained lights that scare away monsters? I think I'll scare away too.

bindings.quest_action: investigate the spiral phenomenon and determine what's causing it
bindings.quest_stakes: the settlement's peace of mind and understanding of what's happening to their fields
bindings.quest_threat: an inexplicable force reshaping our crops with impossible precision
bindings.quest_origin: crops growing in perfect spiral patterns with mineral deposits at their centers

dialogueChunks.intro: I need someone who can look at something impossible and not immediately run away, {player_name}. Are you that person?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} in the fields. Not dying, not blighting: growing in {quest_focus} that shouldn't exist in nature. {target_npc} measured them and says the mathematical precision is beyond deliberate cultivation. At each spiral's center, there's {quest_item}. The {enemy_type} gather near the fields at night but don't attack: they just watch.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_threat} contradicts everything I know. I need you to {quest_action}.

playerResponses.text: Spirals, minerals, and watching monsters? This is the most fascinating thing I've heard in months.
I'll investigate, but if the answer turns out to be dangerous, I reserve the right to leave.
Mathematical crop spirals and gathering monsters? That sounds less like a mystery and more like a warning.

bindings.quest_action: explore the self-unsealed cave and decipher what's inside
bindings.quest_focus: a cave system that opened itself after centuries sealed
bindings.quest_stakes: knowledge of an ancient civilization and their technology
bindings.quest_threat: unknown forces stirring in a place that was deliberately hidden
bindings.quest_origin: stone that simply moved on its own, unsealing a cave sealed since before the settlement was founded

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I've spent thirty years studying the natural world, and last week I encountered something that made me question everything.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} {location_hint}: {quest_origin}. Inside, {target_npc} found walls covered in unreadable writing, tools of unknown materials, and a chamber filled with {quest_item} arranged in a configuration that produces a faint humming sound. The {enemy_type} swarm toward the cave but none will cross the threshold.
dialogueChunks.outro: Ancient writing, unknown materials, and a cave that unsealed itself. I need you to {quest_action}.

playerResponses.text: A cave that opened itself? Unknown writing? I'll explore every inch of it.
This sounds like something that was sealed for a reason. But curiosity wins. I'll look.
Things that unseal themselves are usually best left alone.

bindings.quest_action: discover what has awakened in the tower and why every creature has fled
bindings.quest_focus: the old tower surrounded by absolute silence
bindings.quest_stakes: understanding a phenomenon that has driven every living thing away
bindings.quest_threat: something in the tower that has woken up and terrified every creature for a mile
bindings.quest_origin: the sudden flight of all animals from the area around the tower

dialogueChunks.intro: I've been asking everyone who passes through the same question, {player_name}, and nobody has an answer. Maybe you will.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin}: birds, rabbits, deer, insects, everything within a mile of {quest_focus} {location_hint}. The silence is absolute. {target_npc} found a ring of {quest_item} embedded in the ground in a perfect circle around the tower, immovable. The {enemy_type} have abandoned nests they've occupied for years. {quest_threat} demands investigation.
dialogueChunks.outro: When every creature in the forest runs from the same spot, a wise person asks why. Will you help me {quest_action}?

playerResponses.text: A silent forest and an immovable ring of minerals? I have to see this for myself.
Everything is running from it? That's either very dangerous or very important. Either way, I'm curious.
When every animal flees, the smart move is to join them. Good luck.
